title: Xenial Dense Greek Portobello Mushrooms Pilaf
description: A rich and savory lacto-vegetarian dish featuring poached portobello mushrooms in a sake-infused pilaf, perfect for a romantic evening.

ingredients.name: portobello mushrooms
ingredients.notes: stems removed and caps sliced 1/2 inch thick

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the sliced portobello mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the sake to the saucepan and bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the sake for 2 minutes.
Add the uncooked white rice to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the vegetable broth to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Stir in the crumbled feta cheese and chopped parsley, and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
